subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Clear subheading structures facilitating coherence and navigation (Page 5)
Concise and accurate title effectively orients the reader (Page 1)
Wellâlabeled Introduction provides a logical starting point for rationale and methodology (Page 2)
Final annual tilt calculation is concisely and clearly formatted, aiding reader comprehension (Page 13)
weaknesses: Presence of stray character âÐâ introduces a minor distraction (Page 7)
Some paragraphs are overly long, affecting readability and flow (Page 8)
Repetition in the explanation of seasonal days slightly reduces conciseness
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Two strands achieve band 4 (coherence and organisation) and one strand is at band 3 (conciseness).  The exploration remains highly coherent and exceptionally well organised, with only minor lapses in brevity.  Awarding the maximum 4 points reflects its overall excellence despite these small issues.

strengths: Accurate and consistent use of mathematical notation throughout (arrows, summations, Greek letters)
Effective use of multiple representations (diagrams, tables, piecewise functions and graphs)
Comprehensive table of hourly data that supports subsequent calculations
Wellâaligned equations with variables defined before use
weaknesses: Occasional inconsistent notation (e.g. overhead bar vs arrow on \(\vec{R}_z\))
Lengthy algebraic derivations reduce clarity and could be moved to an appendix
Inconsistent index notation (switching between bold, overline, mathfrak for indices)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Two strands are at band 4 (language and multiple representations) and one strand at band 3 (logical clarity).  Communication is strong and mostly clear, with minor notational and presentation issues.  Awarding 4 points appropriately recognises its high standard.

strengths: Outstanding independent thinking in devising a bespoke vector model rather than using standard formulas
Highly personal approach by framing the investigation around the studentâs own home latitude
Demonstrated initiative through proposals for extending the model (e.g. eastâwest tilt)
weaknesses: The mathematical techniques (vectors, trigonometry) remain within standard methods, limiting ultimate creativity
Manual plotting approach could have been further innovated or automated
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Two strands reach band 3 (independent thinking and personal approach) and one is at band 2 (creativity).  The work shows significant personal engagement and strong initiative, justifying the top mark of 3.

strengths: Substantial critical reflection is threaded throughout, particularly on model assumptions
Deep and insightful analysis of errors and limitations (time intervals, manual plotting, seasonal simplification)
Comprehensive evaluation of outcomes, linking results to the latitude ruleâofâthumb and proposing future improvements
weaknesses: Reflection could be deepened by considering a weighted average by daylight duration
Some reflective notes are concise and might be expanded for further insight
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three strands achieve band 3 (depth of reflection, critical analysis, evaluation).  The exploration demonstrates sustained and substantive reflection and thus merits the full 3 points.

strengths: Extensive and coherent application of vectors, 3D coordinate geometry and summation within a unified model
Mathematics is fully commensurate with SL level and applied across multiple linked contexts
Thorough understanding demonstrated by correct derivations and domain specification
Effective use of graphing software to illustrate functional behaviour
weaknesses: Minor notation inconsistencies (e.g. index formatting) do not affect results
Model simplifies real-world factors (e.g. atmospheric attenuation is omitted)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All strands are assessed at band 5 (relevance, level appropriateness, understanding and accuracy).  The work shows thorough understanding and correct application of SL mathematics, with only negligible errors and simplifications.  Awarding 5 points reflects its high level just below the exceptional band 6.

strandSelections.reasoning: Within each section the mathematical narrative is clear and mostly linear, but long blocks of algebra (full expansions of Z_total) are hard to follow and could have been suppressed.  Occasional notational jumps (switching between n and m for indices) slightly reduce clarity.  Consequently communication is âgoodâ rather than âexcellentâ.

Derivations are largely correct and the model behaves as expected (optimum angles increase toward winter).  Minor lapses (notation inconsistencies, possible rounding) do not materially affect conclusions, demonstrating thorough understanding with only negligible error.

The student combines diagrams, tables of coordinates, piece-wise functions, graphs of Z_total and descriptive prose.  Each representation reinforces the others; for instance, coordinates collected in tables are passed into formulae and the resulting function is graphed.  This is a highly effective and appropriate use of multiple forms.

The student keeps a clear line of argument from the initial context through modelling, calculation, comparison with literature and conclusion.  Definitions, assumptions and successive mathematical steps are introduced exactly where they are needed, so the reader is never forced to âjumpâ between sections.  Minor digressions (e.g. repeated explanations of screen-shots) do not break the flow; therefore the exploration can be described as highly coherent with excellent logical development.

Using manual plotting, reflecting on limitations, and proposing programming automation show good initiative, yet the mathematical techniques themselves remain standard (vectors, trigonometry).  Creativity is therefore âgoodâ rather than âexceptionalâ.

The student critically analyses sources of error (hourly intervals, four-day simplification, manual plotting) and discusses how each could bias the optimum angle.  This depth meets the descriptor of âdeep and insightful analysis throughoutâ.

Results are compared quantitatively with the latitude rule-of-thumb and a 91 % accuracy is computed.  Limitations are linked to concrete future actions (shorter time steps, full-year data, automation).  This constitutes a comprehensive evaluation with future implications.

Reflective comments appear immediately after each major assumption and again in a dedicated Improvement table, revealing substantial reflection threaded throughout rather than confined to the conclusion.

Vector arrows, summation notation, modulus signs, subscripts and Greek letters are used accurately and consistently.  Equations are properly aligned and variables defined before use.  Only minor slips (interchanging \overline{R_z} and \vec{R_z}) are present, so the strand fulfills âconsistent and accurate use throughoutâ.

The write-up is framed around the studentâs familyâs decision to install solar panels and all data are tailored to the exact home latitude. This clearly demonstrates a highly personal and innovative approach to the problem.

Most material is directly linked to answering the research question, but certain descriptions (e.g. step-by-step screen-shot manipulation and full raw expressions for Z_total) are verbose and could have been moved to an appendix without loss.  Repetition appears in the explanation of the four seasonal days.  Overall the work is concise for 14 pages yet not at the highest standard of âall content relevantâ.

Vectors, 3-D coordinate geometry, inverse trigonometric manipulation, summation and graphing software are all directly relevant and applied in a coherent model.  Mathematics is present in every section of the exploration.

The student chooses an entirely self-devised vector model instead of employing widely published empirical formulas and personally extracts hourly coordinates from 3-D software.  This shows outstanding independent thinking in the context of an SL IA.

Sections are clearly labelled Introduction, Methodology, Graphing, Results, Reflection, Improvements and Appendix.  Headings, sub-headings and a contents line make navigation effortless, and each stage ends with a short summary that bridges to the next stage.  The introduction states aim and rationale, the body carries out the mathematics, and the conclusion closes the loop; this corresponds to the exemplar of an âexceptionally well organisedâ report.

All mathematics sits firmly at SL level (vector geometry, trigonometry, functional modelling) and is used extensively across several linked contexts (four seasons).  Although not beyond syllabus, it is fully commensurate and well applied.

annotations.comment: The clear subheading structures in the Methodology section facilitate coherence and navigation.

Numbering in the list is inconsistent (e.g.
circled â2â, missing numeral), making the logical sequence harder to follow.
The title is concise and accurately conveys the focus of the investigation, immediately orienting the reader.
The Introduction section is clearly labeled and provides a logical starting point for the rationale and methodology that follow.
Framing the aim around the studentâs own home location demonstrates a highly personal and innovative approach to the problem.
Reflective acknowledgment of the uniformâmagnitude assumption shows substantial critical reflection on model limitations.

Consider refining the model to include variable solar intensity (e.g.
atmospheric attenuation) instead of an entirely uniform magnitude.
The derivation of $|\vec{R}|=\sqrt{x^2+y^2+z^2}$ is accurate and demonstrates solid understanding of 3D distance formula.
Figure 3 effectively visualizes the coordinate axes and panel geometry, reinforcing the written explanation.
Notation for the component $\overrightarrow{R_z}$ is inconsistent (overline vs arrow). Standardize notation for clarity.
The lengthy algebraic derivation could be condensed or moved to the appendix to improve readability.
Remove the stray character âÐâ which appears to be an OCR or typing error and does not contribute to the derivation.
Using the 3D software arrow to model $\vec{R}$ demonstrates creative application of technology to extract coordinate data.
This paragraph is very long and could be split into smaller chunks for improved readability and flow.
Manual screenshot alignment is prone to parallax error; consider automating the capture of $x,y$ coordinates via software API.
The comprehensive table of hourly $x_n,y_n$ data is highly effective for subsequent function evaluation.
Index notation for $n$ appears in multiple formats (bold, overline, mathfrak), reducing clarity. Use a single consistent form.
Figures 8 and 9 complement the text by visually demonstrating the plotting process for successive hours.
The plotted graph of $Z_{\text{summer total}}$ against $\theta$ is clear and effectively highlights the maximum point.
Clearly stating the domain $0\le\theta\le180$Â° strengthens mathematical rigour and avoids ambiguity.
Presentation of the final annual tilt calculation is concise and clearly formatted, aiding reader comprehension.
Reflection notes could be deepened by discussing whether a weighted average by daylight duration might refine the annual optimum.
The dedicated âStrengthsâ section demonstrates thoughtful selfâevaluation and critical analysis of outcomes.
Linking the result to the latitude ruleâofâthumb and computing a 91% accuracy rate shows insightful evaluation of outcomes.
The proposed extension to explore an eastâwest tilt shows creativity in expanding the scope of the investigation.
Suggest calculating the actual annual energy yield by integrating sunlight absorbed into a power model, enhancing real-world relevance.
